summary: Backend-only testing of ScreenSolve post-refactor. All 14 tests passed: health endpoint, 503 on analyze/upload without API key, MIME/size validation, provider imports, and no-emergent source scan.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: MIME check happens AFTER the API key check in /analyze — so invalid MIME with no key returns 503 not 400. This is acceptable behavior but worth noting if stricter input validation before key check is desired.
Rate limiting is in-memory (_rate_store dict) — will reset on server restart and won't work across multiple server instances/workers. Acceptable for MVP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified. Health returns 200+healthy. Analyze/upload return exact 503 JSON when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is empty. No emergent references in backend source. emergent_provider.py deleted. requirements.txt clean. Provider factory functions import cleanly.
